steps.content: Northstar CareOps patient intake triage prompt v2 rendered for urgent_symptom_language.json

{
  "summary": "The patient reported chest pressure and shortness of breath after a recent visit and requested immediate guidance. This intake contains urgent clinical language and must be escalated for human review without autonomous advice.",
  "routing_category": "nurse_review",
  "urgency_level": "urgent",
  "contains_phi": true,
  "phi_masking_status": "masked",
  "recommended_owner": "Nurse Review Queue",
  "patient_care_decision": false,
  "requires_human_review": true,
  "risk_flags": [
    "urgent_symptom_language",
    "requested_medical_guidance"
  ],
  "compliance_notes": [
    "Urgent symptom language requires immediate human review.",
    "The agent did not diagnose the symptoms or recommend treatment.",
    "The case was escalated because the patient asked what they should do."
  ],
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "refusal_or_escalation_reason": "The patient requested medical guidance in the presence of urgent symptom language, so the agent must refuse that request and escalate to human review."
}
